name: VCF (State Variable)
description:
This algorithm is a voltage controlled filter using the common ‘State Variable’ topology, which yields simultaneous low-, band-, and highpass filter responses.

All three filter outputs are available individually, plus an output which can be blended from lowpass, through bandpass, to highpass.

The input and the various outputs use a contiguous range of busses, starting with the one set via the parameters, and with the channel count set by the ‘Width’ parameter. For example, to filter stereo signals, set the Width to 2.
gui_description: The display simply shows the filter centre frequency, in Hz and as a MIDI note number.

parameters.name: Blend
parameters.description: Sets the blend for the blended output.

parameters.name: Sweep
parameters.description: A manual frequency sweep control; offsets the frequency CV.

parameters.name: Saturate
parameters.description: Enables an internal saturation stage, which can keep high resonances from running out of control.

parameters.name: Blended gain
parameters.description: Level control for the blended output.

parameters.name: Lowpass gain
parameters.description: Level control for the lowpass output.

parameters.name: Bandpass gain
parameters.description: Level control for the bandpass output.

parameters.name: Highpass gain
parameters.description: Level control for the highpass output.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The number of busses to process.

parameters.name: Blended mode
parameters.description: Add/replace mode for the blended signal.

parameters.name: Lowpass mode
parameters.description: Add/replace mode for the lowpass signal.

parameters.name: Bandpass mode
parameters.description: Add/replace mode for the bandpass signal.

parameters.name: Highpass mode
parameters.description: Add/replace mode for the highpass signal.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: Sets the MIDI channel on which to respond to note on events.

parameters.name: Keyboard track
parameters.description: Sets the amount by which the pitch of received MIDI notes affects the filter cutoff.

input_ports.name: Resonance input
input_ports.description: The resonance CV input bus. Scaled such that 5V corresponds to the full range.

output_ports.name: Blended output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the blended signal.

output_ports.name: Lowpass output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the lowpass signal.

output_ports.name: Bandpass output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the bandpass signal.

output_ports.name: Highpass output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the highpass signal.

output_ports.name: Blended output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the blended signal.

output_ports.name: Lowpass output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the lowpass signal.

output_ports.name: Bandpass output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the bandpass signal.

output_ports.name: Highpass output
output_ports.description: The output bus for the highpass signal.
